name: ExchangeMT Unusual Outbound Email
description: Detects an unusually high volume of emails (more than 60) sent by the same sender within a one-hour timeframe, which can indicate potential email compromise, spamming activity, or data exfiltration.

prompts.prompt: Unusual outbound email volume detected from a single sender, potentially indicating email compromise, spam, or data exfiltration. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Sender** {sender}, **Recipient** {recipient}, **Subject** {subject}, **Event ID** {EventID}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately to determine the cause and mitigate potential threats.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the email sending event.

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: The email address of the sender.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: The email address of the recipient.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject of the email, if available.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for the email sending event.
